name: libstring-random-perl
title: libstring-random-perl
summary: Perl module for generating random strings
description:
Perl module for generating random strings
String::Random is used to generate random strings based on provided
patterns. It was written to make generating random passwords and such
a little easier.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libstring-random-perl because Perl module for generating random strings.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libstring-random-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libstring-random-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libstring-random-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
